Your Word Is a Lamp to My Feet<p class=|acrostic|

NoteThis psalm is an acrostic poem of twenty-two stanzas, following the letters of the Hebrew alphabet; within a stanza, each verse begins with the same Hebrew letter.

&#1489;<br

&#1490;<br

&#1491;<br

&#1492;<br

NoteOr keep them as my reward
NoteTwo MT manuscripts and DSS; most MT manuscripts in Your way

&#1493;<br

&#1494;<br

&#1495;<br

&#1496;<br

NoteOr fat

&#1497;<br

&#1499;<br

NoteOr How many are the days of Your servant?

&#1500;<br

NoteOr They stand this day according to Your ordinances

&#1502;<br

&#1504;<br

&#1505;<br

&#1506;<br

&#1508;<br

In My Distress I Cried to the LORD
